Entries.AcceptGift_(O)260: Ah, thank you, but, um...I don't handle spicy things well.$2#$b#They upset my stomach quite badly.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)341: Oh, what lovely craftsmanship! Are you sure I can have this?
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)376: Oh, thank you so much, @!$1#$b#Poppies make an excellent pain reliever when dried. I like to keep a stock of them.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)400: *gasp* Oh, my favorite! How did you know?$1
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)417: Oh my goodness...#$b#I've never been able to grow one of these...are you really sure I can have this?
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)420: Um...@?$2#$b#Are you trying to poison me...?$2
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)454: A-are you really sure I can have this, @? It must have taken so long to grow!#$b#
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)829: Ah, thank you, @!$1#$b#Ginger is a fantastic stomach remedy. I greatly recommend it for nausea.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O)StardropTea: Oh my, is this really for me?$1#$b#Ah, this aroma...it's so nostalgic...it's been a long time since I had a cup...$1
Entries.AcceptGift_(O){{ModId}}.PainTonic: You made some medicine for me?$1#$b#Thank you, @. I can never have too much on hand.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O){{ModId}}.EnergizingTonic: You made some medicine for me?$1#$b#Thank you, @. I can never have too much on hand.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O){{ModId}}.SunshineTonic: You made some medicine for me?$1#$b#Thank you, @. I can never have too much on hand.
Entries.AcceptGift_(O){{ModId}}.AncientTonic: You made some medicine for me?$1#$b#Thank you, @. I can never have too much on hand.
Entries.RejectItem_(O)790: Ah...sorry, this isn't mine. I can see why you'd think it was, though.
Entries.RejectItem_(O)864: Sorry, I don't know who this is.
Entries.RejectItem_(O)865: Oh, goodness, that scent is so strong! A bit too intense for me...
Entries.RejectItem_(O)866: What a lovely flower...ah, but I can't accept this.
Entries.RejectItem_(O)868: What a peculiar item...though, I don't know what you want me to do with it.#$b#Perhaps someone else is looking for it?
Entries.RejectItem_(O)869: What the--?#$b#Why are you carrying a worm around?
Entries.RejectItem_(O)870: I'm not sure who this belongs to, but it's not me...
Entries.RejectItem_(O)875: AUGH!!#$b#I'm not touching that--get it away from me!
Entries.RejectItem_(O)876: Why do you have that? And why are you trying to give it to me?
Entries.RejectItem_(O)897: A stocklist...? I don't know why you'd think I need that...

Entries.{{ModId}}_Aelin: {{Random: Goodness, this weather is absolutely dreadful...$2 && This rain has me feeling more drained than usual...$2 && Oh, @, you're soaked!#$b#Here, sit down a moment to dry off. && The rain is rather strong today.#$b#At least you don't have to water your farm, though!$1 |inputSeparator=&&}}

Entries.AcceptGift_(O)651: How did you know I like these?#$b#Eugene must have told you, didn't he? That little scoundrel!$1
Entries.AcceptGift_(O){{ModId}}.StrawberryTea: Oh my, this is delicious!$1#$b#Eugene must have given you his recipe. It's absolutely divine, @.$1
